user.title: Environment Canada Weather
user.description: Search for your city to set up weather data. The nearest city to your Home Assistant location is pre-filled.

select_city.title: Select City
select_city.description: Multiple cities matched your search. Select the correct one.

confirm.title: Confirm Settings
confirm.description: Confirm the settings for {city_name} ({province}) — city code: {city_code}. Auto-discovered values are pre-filled — edit if needed.

error.no_city_found: No city found — try a different spelling (accents matter for French names).
error.api_error: Could not reach the Environment Canada API. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: Environment Canada Weather is already configured.
